mapper.insert:
SELECT to_char(seq_cvpl.nextval) FROM dual
INSERT INTO cvpl /* kr.or.ddit.domain.apt.complaint.mapper.ICvplMapper.insertCvplApply */ ( cvpl_no, cvpl_ty_cd, cvpl_loc, cvpl_cn, cvpl_stts_cd , cvpl_reg_dt, cvpl_mdf_dt, cvpl_rcpt_dt, cvpl_end_dt , cvpl_prrt, cvpl_file_no, cvpl_ttl, user_no, ho_no, apt_cmplex_no) VALUES ( #{cvplNo}, #{cvplTyCd}, #{cvplLoc}, #{cvplCn}, 'APLY' , sysdate, null, null, null , null, #{cvplFileNo}, #{cvplTtl}, #{userNo}, #{hoNo}, #{aptCmplexNo})

SELECT seq_cvpl_hstry.nextval FROM dual
INSERT INTO cvpl_hstry /* kr.or.ddit.domain.apt.complaint.mapper.ICvplMapper.insertCvplHstry */ ( cvpl_hstry_id, cvpl_ans, pic_id, cvpl_reg_dt, cvpl_stts_cd, cvpl_no) VALUES ( #{cvplHstryId}, #{cvplAns}, #{picId}, sysdate, #{cvplSttsCd}, #{cvplNo})
mapper.select: SELECT cvpl_no, cvpl_ty_cd, cvpl_loc, cvpl_cn, cvpl_stts_cd , cvpl_reg_dt, cvpl_mdf_dt, cvpl_rcpt_dt, cvpl_end_dt , cvpl_prrt, cvpl_file_no, cvpl_ttl, user_no, ho_no, apt_cmplex_no FROM cvpl WHERE user_no = #{userNo} AND apt_cmplex_no = #{aptCmplexNo} ORDER BY cvpl_reg_dt DESC

SELECT c.cvpl_no, cvpl_ty_cd, cvpl_loc, cvpl_cn, cvpl_stts_cd , cvpl_reg_dt, cvpl_mdf_dt, cvpl_rcpt_dt, cvpl_end_dt , cvpl_prrt, cvpl_file_no, cvpl_ttl , c.user_no, m.user_id, m.user_nm, ho_no, apt_cmplex_no FROM cvpl c INNER JOIN member m ON (m.user_no = c.user_no) WHERE apt_cmplex_no = #{aptCmplexNo} ORDER BY cvpl_reg_dt DESC
SELECT c.cvpl_no, c.user_no, m.user_id, m.user_nm, ho_no, apt_cmplex_no FROM cvpl c INNER JOIN member m ON (m.user_no = c.user_no) WHERE cvpl_no = #{cvplNo}
SELECT cvpl_no, cvpl_ty_cd, cvpl_loc, cvpl_cn, cvpl_stts_cd , cvpl_reg_dt, cvpl_mdf_dt, cvpl_rcpt_dt, cvpl_end_dt , cvpl_file_no, cvpl_ttl, user_no FROM cvpl WHERE cvpl_no = #{cvplNo}
SELECT cvpl_ans FROM ( SELECT cvpl_ans FROM cvpl_hstry WHERE cvpl_no = #{cvplNo} AND cvpl_ans IS NOT NULL ORDER BY cvpl_reg_dt DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
